selected_direction.title: Spectral Movement
selected_direction.concept: Focuses on the fluid motion of koi across the weapon's curved geometry.
selected_direction.hero_strategy: Dense multi-scale theme artwork whose large crops remain visually complete.
selected_direction.secondary_strategy: Distribute supporting motifs and material detail across the full canvas.
selected_direction.connector_strategy: Use continuous line, colour, and texture rhythm rather than component stickers.
selected_direction.background_strategy: Resolve the background as an active material field with no large dead zones.
selected_direction.route_a_logic: Brief: garden. Style: A high-contrast exploration of a nocturnal garden where cold stone textures are punctured by ethereal, glowing botanical and aquatic life forms. The aesthetic balances architectural rigidity with fluid organic motion.. Direction: Focuses on the fluid motion of koi across the weapon's curved geometry.. Visual language: wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift. Motifs: spectral koi, water ripples, lotus petals. Palette: #0B132B, #1C2541, #3A506B, #7FFFD4, #E94560, #F4F4F4. Material cues: porous weathered stone, cool-touch silk-finish water, glowing emissive plant fiber, matte metallic dark accents. Route A objective: Establish a seamless, dense texture field of the garden floor and pond edge.. tiling stone textures with subtle moss overlays; interspersing glowing lotus buds at 15% density; rhythmic placement of bamboo segments to guide the eye. Emphasis: Overlapping ripple patterns for rhythmic flow.. Required: zero blank space, constant contrast ratio between stone and light, no large focal objects to allow for weapon-wide cropping. Avoid: sharp vector edges, uniform grid layouts, bright daylight saturation, industrial hardware schematics, hyper-realistic human anatomy.
selected_direction.route_b_logic: Brief: garden. Style: A high-contrast exploration of a nocturnal garden where cold stone textures are punctured by ethereal, glowing botanical and aquatic life forms. The aesthetic balances architectural rigidity with fluid organic motion.. Direction: Focuses on the fluid motion of koi across the weapon's curved geometry.. Visual language: wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift. Motifs: spectral koi, water ripples, lotus petals. Palette: #0B132B, #1C2541, #3A506B, #7FFFD4, #E94560, #F4F4F4. Material cues: porous weathered stone, cool-touch silk-finish water, glowing emissive plant fiber, matte metallic dark accents. Route B objective: generate one complete, dense, crop-robust master artwork, fit it across continuous left/right/top weapon space, then automatically cut and repack it through the OBJ-derived UV atlas. Distribute useful visual information at multiple scales across the full image; avoid large empty regions. Subject-part placement on named weapon components is not required or evaluated. Avoid: sharp vector edges, uniform grid layouts, bright daylight saturation, industrial hardware schematics, hyper-realistic human anatomy.
selected_direction.recommendation_reason: Distinct Spectral Movement interpretation with explicit Route A and crop-robust master-artwork Route B logic.
world_elements: An ornate, moss-covered stone lantern emitting a soft, ethereal cyan glow.
A graceful, semi-translucent koi fish with flowing fins, caught mid-turn in dark water.
Closed and partially blooming lotus flowers with bioluminescent tips.
Vertical, segmented bamboo stalks that serve as grounding frame lines.
Subtle, overlapping circular ripples on a dark, wet-stone texture.
Dark, worn flagstone paving tiles with fine fissures and moss accumulation.
Delicate, trailing willow branches that frame the upper edge of the receiver.
Tiny, scattered pin-points of light creating depth and motion across the canvas.
small symbolic objects related to the main theme
environmental fragments that imply a complete world
fine material grain and ornamental micro-detail
selected_direction.generator_brief: Original A nocturnal, bioluminescent botanical garden layout with flowing water and stone lantern highlights. design, Focuses on the fluid motion of koi across the weapon's curved geometry.; spectral koi, water ripples, lotus petals; balanced medium-scale motifs and clear negative space

constraints: do not silently change the selected concept
Route A and Route B must share the locked palette and visual language
accept final quality only from mapped multi-view previews

selected_artwork.title: Ornamental Tapestry
selected_artwork.variation: symbol-led tapestry with repeated medium motifs, treasure-like details, patterned borders dissolved into the field, material ornament, and dense micro-symbols

validation.semantic_status: The artwork successfully captures the Midnight Serenity theme with a high-density, nocturnal garden landscape. It features the required motifs—koi, stone lanterns, lotus flowers, and bamboo—distributed across the canvas in clusters without any subject dominating the composition or spanning the full width. The atmosphere is maintained through consistent bioluminescent lighting and detailed textures, and no forbidden objects (weapons, watermarks, or mockups) are present.
